overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City. The player character moves from a neon-lit commercial street past construction barriers and holographic billboards, through a dark narrow alley with red neon lighting, and emerges into a palm-tree-lined plaza with modern architecture. The environment features dense urban cyberpunk aesthetics with atmospheric fog and reflective wet surfaces.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet neon-lit city street at night. The camera moves forward past a green 'CITY' neon sign on the left and red-white construction barriers on the right. A large pink holographic billboard of a guitarist illuminates the right side of the street while a pedestrian in red walks ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional area with large digital billboards approaching alley

events.description: passing large digital billboards and approaching narrow alley entrance

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past large advertising screens and turning slightly toward alley entrance

elevated digital screen spanning across the street ahead
dark opening between buildings leading to narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions past massive digital billboards on the left building wall. The construction barriers continue along the right side but recede into the distance. The camera approaches a dark alley entrance ahead while the pink guitarist billboard and city sign disappear behind. The environment shifts from open street to a more enclosed corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with red neon lighting and debris

events.description: entering dark narrow alley illuminated by red neon strip lights on left wall

agents.ego_description: navigating through tight alleyway with walls on both sides, stepping over debris

industrial metal railing and fence structure on right side
large overhead digital billboard displaying colorful 'WRAITHS' advertisement
scattered trash bags and concrete rubble on ground

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts dramatically to a narrow enclosed alley with walls on both sides. Red neon strips illuminate the left wall while the right side features metal railings. The ground is littered with debris and trash bags. The overhead billboard displaying 'WRAITHS' looms ahead as the camera moves deeper into the dark passage, creating a claustrophobic atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with palm trees and modern architecture

events.description: exiting narrow alley into open plaza area with palm trees and large modern building

agents.ego_description: emerging from alley and walking toward crosswalk with group of pedestrians ahead

entered.detail: tall palm trees with spotlights illuminating the fronds
multi-story modern building with horizontal lines and red signage
large digital billboard structure displaying colorful advertisements
zebra crossing stripes on the concrete ground ahead
open public space with distant city lights and buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the dark alley into a spacious open plaza dramatically lit by spotlights. Palm trees line the left side while a distinctive modern building with red signage dominates the center view. The large digital billboard now appears on the right side of the frame. The camera approaches a crosswalk where a group of pedestrians waits, with the open cityscape visible beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit commercial street through a claustrophobic alleyway and into a spacious modern plaza. It begins by gliding past a green city sign and red-white construction barriers, with a large pink holographic guitarist casting a glow over the wet pavement. As the camera moves forward, the open street narrows and the bright billboards recede, shifting the environment into a dark, enclosed corridor lined with red neon strips and littered with debris. The scene then pushes deeper into this oppressive passage under a looming Wraiths billboard before suddenly emerging from the shadows into a wide, spotlight-lit plaza. Finally, the view opens up to reveal palm trees and a modern building with red signage as the camera approaches a group of pedestrians waiting at a crosswalk.
